title: The Wanderer
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:The Wanderer?}}__NOTOC__
==
Description== The Wanderer, is very hard to explain. It is merely a myth, nothing but superstition. But somehow it became real. It was rumored to be a placeholder of the [[M.E.G]] database that somehow became "sentient". But even after countless research, we could not find a single trace of "The Wanderer". The Wanderer doesn't exist. It's unknown, nobody knows why or how this entity exists. The entity is nothing, nonexistent, or is it? (Update: I think I found out what The Wanderer actually is.) The Wanderer's physical appearance is unknown. It is completely invisible. However, it is still sentient. It tricks wanderers into believing it doesn't exist and infects their minds with doubt and denial.
WARNING! DATA CORRUPTED!
Restoring Data...
Welcome, {{USERNAME}}. ==Description== The Wanderer, also known as "Gary" is an extremely powerful and enigmatic individual who is secretive about all his private information. Not many people know about this entity, as he is only rarely seen wandering around the halls of the Backrooms. He doesn't reveal much about his backstory; only a few people have seen him, although all those people have been reported dead. He is a considerably omnipotent entity, knowing everything about the Backrooms and having many powerful abilities. If you have the chance to talk or interact with him, do not. He will blabber continuously about alternate realities and then he will kill you to hide his secrets. He has a bunch of henchmen whom he calls "Weaklings". Rumors say that he is planning to use his henchmen to take over the Backrooms. However, his intentions remain unknown for now. The Wanderer resembles a normal adult male in his 20s, and he is approximately 182 centimeters tall. He dons an exceptionally dark red shirt with navy pants and has shoes that contain mysterious symbols on them. Attempts to decode these symbols have all failed. His hair is straight and spiky, and half of his face is completely gone, showing the flesh and bones on the left side of his face. This is considered his "actual" appearance. However, no evidence that can support this statement, as he can shapeshift into any wanderer or entity. He blends into groups of wanderers until he is ready to strike, much like The King of Normality, which he'll then kill the group of wanderers he blends in. Always stay cautious, because he could be blending into your group or colony right now. Soon, you won't even know what hit you. The Wanderer has only mentioned his backstory to one other person: The King of Normality. Luckily, The King of Normality was willing to share this information with the M.E.G., so we were able to document his backstory. The King of Normality says that he's the first person to have ever entered the Backrooms (or so he claims to be), but he got corrupted by an unknown being, which King of Normality described as "something that is pure evil". He soon somehow glitched out of reality itself. He was tortured, and chained up by his soul until he finally escaped using his remaining power and energy. When he got out, he only had half of his face, and once he saw it, he turned insane. He went on a murderous rampage, killing every human or entity that was in his way, and presumably went to the fourth dimension after he had gained satisfaction from his killing. He continues to stay in the fourth dimension, monitoring the stability of the Backrooms and the people inside them. Although he still has violent tendencies, he rarely kills people nowadays. The Wanderer has shown amazing power, so most people believe he is one of the most powerful entities in the Backrooms. He has displayed many different unique abilities, such as traveling through different dimensions, killing people with a slight touch, controlling entities to attack wanderers, etc. He frequently brags to his peers about having killed over a thousand people attempting to get to a highly guarded dimension. However, he almost died in the process and had to retreat. This entity is highly dangerous, so if you encounter this entity make sure to stay out of its way, and be silent. ==Behavior== The Wanderer is a mysterious individual, as barely anybody knows how he behaves and how he acts. Most people who talk to him ended up dying a painful death. His behavior in general might not even be his true behavior, as he is always acting to avoid anybody from documenting him. So there is a possibility that he's completely faking his personality. Rumors say that he is not who he seems and that he is an insane, psychotic being who has no control over himself. The Wanderer has multiple forms, and his behavior depends on his form. When he is disguised as an entity or wanderer, he is usually calm and peaceful and acts like a regular wanderer who has just entered the Backrooms. If someone questions why he is being so suspicious, he will brutally kill them. If he is in his true form, he will be more communicative. However, he will kill anyone who asks him about what The King of Normality calls "personal questions", which are questions like "Who are you?", "Why are you so creepy?", "How did you become like this?", etc. ==Capabilities== The power of The Wanderer will be separated into five parts: Strength, Durability, Mobility, Flexibility and Abilities. ===Wanderer Form=== *'''Strength:''' The strength of an ordinary wanderer, can't do much damage. *'''Durability:''' Is a little bit harder than the ordinary wanderer, that's presumably because when the transformation happens, some entity bones are mixed with the human bones. *'''Mobility:''' Can run at 17 mph, better than the average human. *'''Flexibility:''' Is very flexible and can do advanced gymnastics/ *'''Abilities:''' Can boost the adrenaline inside of him, making him more powerful than most heavily armed wanderers. ===True Form=== *'''Strength:''' Is powerful and can kill someone with a slight touch. *'''Durability:''' Is strong as heavy tanks from WW2 (a war from the Frontrooms), can only be slightly damaged by really huge explosions. *'''Mobility:''' Can run exceptionally fast when he wants to, but he prefers walking slowly and menacingly. *'''Flexibility:''' The flexibility doesn't change. *'''Abilities:''' Can control entities when in emergency situations, he can also make glitches come out of random levels, travel through dimensions, etc. ==Relation To Entities== The Wanderer's relation to entities is very simple. He is only kind to powerful entities like him, and he treats weak entities like puppets to puppeteers. ==Log== This is a log between three wanderers, who just so happened to encounter The Wanderer.
'''*A conversation is heard as they walk through the hallway*''' '''Wanderer 1: Base is so cruel, they make us do all these life-risking missio-''' '''Wanderer 3: Yo, guys, look!''' '''Wanderer 2: Woah, is that an entity?''' '''???: I prefer the term "human".''' '''Wanderer 3: Alright, well hello?''' '''???: Hello.''' '''Wanderer 1: Why is half of your face gone, dude? It's so creepy.''' '''*Loud screams can be heard from Wanderer 1*''' '''Wanderer 2: Um... I-I think we should go now.''' '''Wanderer 3: Y-yeah.''' '''???: Oh no you're not.''' '''Wanderer 2: Dude. Run, '''RUN, RUN.''' '''*Connection Lost*'''
==Do's and Don't's== ===Do's=== *Stay silent *Stay away *Don't interact ===Don't's=== *Make loud noises *Speak to the entity *Run from the entity *Make eye contact with the entity ==Discovery== The Wanderer was unofficially discovered when a group of wanderers became suspicious of a person in their group, they questioned him and all died except for one, who was later hunted down and killed by Entity 1 as well. He was confirmed to be an entity in 2004. ==Extra Info== *The Wanderer is rumored to control all dimensions *The Wanderer has talked about his "master" multiple times with wanderers *The Wanderer has once transformed into someone from [[The Frontrooms]] *The Wanderer has more abilities than you think
"''Remember, '''you are not alone.'''''''''''.'''''"'''''
- ???
